entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop studied for productivity enhancement in rainfed conditions

entities.name: CENTRAL KARNATAKA
entities.description: The region in India where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: The water regime where crops rely solely on rainfall

entities.name: MULTI-NUTRIENT DEFICIENT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Soil conditions lacking multiple essential nutrients

entities.name: INTEGRATED NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of balanced nutrition including macro and micronutrients to enhance productivity

entities.name: FARMERS' INPUTS
entities.description: The standard fertilizer inputs used by farmers

entities.name: NITROGEN AND PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Additional macro-nutrients applied to the soil

entities.name: SULFUR, BORON AND ZINC
entities.description: Additional micronutrients applied to the soil

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of maize grain produced per unit area

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of maize stover produced per unit area

entities.name: PLANT NUTRITION
entities.description: The nutritional status and nutrient content of the maize plant

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic gain derived from the crop production

entities.name: RAIN WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which the crop utilizes available rainwater

entities.name: PARTIAL FACTOR PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The productivity increase attributed to a specific nutrient input

entities.name: AGRONOMIC EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The yield increase per unit of nutrient applied

entities.name: BENEFIT: COST RATIO
entities.description: The ratio of the value of the output to the cost of the inputs

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE SOIL RESOURCE BASE
entities.description: The maintenance of soil health and fertility for long-term productivity

entities.name: NUTRIENT UPTAKE
entities.description: The absorption of N, P, K, S, and Zn by the grain and above-ground parts
